Off Calendar May-25-2012 Continued To Aug-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Hearing On Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AARON J. EHRLICH OF KATZOFF & RIGGS, TEL. NO. (510) 588-5187 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JULIET MAC-MILLIN-LOMPA OF THE STONE & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (925) 938-1555 EXT. 10 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT LA LANNE FITNESS LLC;

RULING - A R G U E D; Order To Show Cause is granted. All weightlifting that involves the dropping of weights over 50 pounds should occur outside the building between 8am and 5pm on weekdays. The surveillance camera should be pointed in a manner that does not look into the gym. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
